commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Quasi filii obedientiae, non configurati prior bus desideriis, quae fuerunt in ignomntia; sed secundum eum, qui vocavit vos, sanctum, et ipsi sancti sitis in omni conversatione. Quoniam scrip rum est: "Sancti eritis, quoniam ego sanctus sum."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: As children of obedience; i.e. as obedient children. (Witham)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
